title: Engineering of glycyrrhizin-loaded chitosan nanogel for pulmonary immunomodulation via regulation of NF-κB signaling and macrophage polarization in lung inflammatory.
snippet: Acute lung injury involves excessive inflammation, neutrophil infiltration, and impaired macrophage polarization, underscoring the need for effective immunomodulatory therapies. Here, we developed a glycyrrhizin-loaded chitosan nanogel (GlyU@CS) as a biocompatible macromolecular platform for targeted modulation of pulmonary inflammation. MD simulations veri...
